nodes.what_was_done: Full pre-frozen LA-LB administrative toponym record-linkage design: blind A<->B tier-A sign map (77 signs, hash 77de6684), 11 PRIMARY internal-only LA candidates (hash eb2bb293) vs 33 independent LB toponym targets (29e25d49), no-free-mapping matchers A1-A5, positive controls PC1-PC4 (exact implant 100% recovery / 0 FP), Monte-Carlo nulls (FP 1.25%), 66 effective units, ARKH ambiguity quarantined. Five known pairs (pa-i-to, tu-ru-sa, di-ki-ta, i-da, se-to-i-ja) source-audited and demoted to DEVELOPMENT_BENCHMARK; di-de-ru~di-de-ro, pa-je-re~pa-je-ro held as SPECULATIVE.
nodes.channel: administrative toponym continuity (lexical record linkage, no free mapping search)
nodes.outcome: Split verdict: H_exact = NULL_PUBLISHED (fully powered, min detectable 1 pair, observed 0 exact continuities) / H_drift = NO_POWER (genuine drift e.g. tu-ru-sa->tu-ri-so unrecoverable without the forbidden flexible mapping). CIRCULARITY_LOW. Named next step: a drift-tolerant redesign with pre-registered null-calibrated edit operations = a materially different design requiring a new input-freeze review.
nodes.relevance_to: E206 (this IS the direct predecessor of gated onomastic record linkage: reusable frozen packets, sign map, known-pair quarantine ledger, PC battery; E206 must be the drift-tolerant redesign the verdict names, or it re-runs a closed NO_POWER)

nodes.what_was_done: Feasibility+power-only audit of the ritual (libation-formula) continuity channel, forked after the administrative closure; no real matching run.
nodes.outcome: COMPLETE / NO_POWER — drift inadmissible, permissive matching FP ~1, no in-domain exemplar; the ritual channel is closed at feasibility stage.
nodes.relevance_to: E206 (ritual-genre linkage already priced as NO_POWER; E206 designs must not silently reopen it)

nodes.what_was_done: Pre-registered, Zenodo-timestamped one-shot cross-script value-recovery gates: PPMI-SVD + Procrustes distributional channel plus toponym-pin word completion over the 5 Steele&Meissner Table 6.4 equations (pa-i-to, se-to-i-ja, tu-ru-sa, di-ki-te, su-ki-ri-ta) and Younger anchors (ku-ta, ku-ni-su, sa-ra2). Phase 1: h=20 held-out anchors (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21168887). Phase 2: quota-certified 8-anchor redesign (DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21173639), corrected two-attempt bar.
nodes.outcome: Phase 1: REFUTE_LOTO_FRAGILE — full stat clears (p=0.0305) on exactly 2 pins, I (via se-to-i-ja) and RI (via su-ki-ri-ta), each one-toponym-deep; LOTO kills it. Distributional channel = 0.0000 (third independent null). Phase 2: REFUTE (missed corrected bar by 0.0002); hits SU (ku-ni-su) + TO (pa-i-to), again one-identification-deep; fourth distributional null. Census verdict: more anchors of the same kind will not move it.
nodes.relevance_to: E206 (the one-deep-pin bound is the exact obstacle gated record linkage must overcome; any retry needs a NEW prereg+timestamp), E210 (distributional-alignment nulls are the baseline OT must beat), E208

nodes.what_was_done: Mechanical scan of the published Ariadne-2025 Kanta et al. Anetaki overview against the frozen anchor census.
nodes.outcome: New LOTO legs = 0; new candidate anchor words = 0 transliterated; ~16 well-preserved but UNPUBLISHED sign-groups from a Knossos cult context; supply verdict PENDING-FULL-EDITION (Anetaki II). Also: a six-fraction sequence with a new relative-value ordering and a probable new LA sign.
nodes.relevance_to: E206 (the only live anchor-supply route), E205 (new carriers), E203 (delta seals)

nodes.what_was_done: External (Egyptian/Near-Eastern) onomastic anchor acquisition: Kom el-Hetan toponym group-writings (Knossos/Amnisos/Lyktos via Cline&Stannish 2011), Hoch calibration corpus; Egyptian phonetic-anchor one-shot gate; anchor-lattice WP-D re-census.
nodes.outcome: Egyptian channel one-shot: mechanical CONFIRM but honest interpretation TRIVIAL/NULL (edge = 1 training record, LOO flips it) — channel NOT confirmed, programme CLOSED. WP-D: {Egyptian-rendered Cretan toponyms} intersect {LA >=4-slot attested} = {Phaistos} only (3 slots, sub-threshold) -> SOURCE_EXPANSION_NULL, 0 new independent multi-slot anchors.
nodes.relevance_to: E206 (external-lineage anchors are the dependency-distinct kind E206 needs; the census says none currently exist)

nodes.what_was_done: Decoder for the SigLA database shipped in corpus/bronze/sigla_browse_2026/database.js (OCaml Marshal blobs) -> 802 docs / 376 signs / per-glyph bounding boxes, validated against silver (575 matched; 730 silver + 143 SigLA docs genuinely absent from the other side — see la-lb-continuity SIGLA_SILVER_CROSSWALK.md).
nodes.outcome: Working, validated; JSON gitignored (CC BY-NC-SA). SigLA is the ONLY in-repo glyph-geometry source and it carries bboxes only.
nodes.relevance_to: E205 (the data substrate; do not re-acquire)

nodes.what_was_done: 15 preregistered F23_SPATIAL epochs on SigLA per-glyph bboxes, all L2, all with permutation nulls + positive controls: glyph size (E076-E078), 2D spacing/ruling (E079-E084), layout registers (E081, E085-E087), mechanism tests (E088-E090).
nodes.channel: spatial/layout palaeography (bbox geometry, opaque sign IDs)
nodes.outcome: Banked findings: glyph SIZE is a shared cross-site per-sign convention (E076, r 0.70-0.85) with a cross-site frequency->smaller economy-of-effort law (E078, r=-0.351, p=0.0004); VERTICAL line spacing is deliberate ruled layout cross-site (E080+E084) while HORIZONTAL pitch regularity is glyph-WIDTH-driven, not deliberate (E083 qualifying E079); left-justification (E081), heading-size salience (E085) and longer header rows (E086) are Haghia-Triada-local registers with a size<->length tradeoff (E087) explained by a doc-wide bounded writing width (E089/E090), not an ink budget (E088). E082 = MACHINERY_UNINFORMATIVE (PC uncalibratable).
nodes.relevance_to: E205 (this is the measured state of the art for channels A-D: bbox geometry is largely exhausted at L2; new value must come from finer measurement or new axes, and HT-register vs cross-site confounds must be controlled)

nodes.what_was_done: WP-E attempted to build the stroke/orientation corpus (the one non-circular shape channel, flagged never-built by the methodology inventory); WP-L built a fail-closed 3D ingestion+validation pipeline.
nodes.outcome: Both SOURCE_BLOCKED: SigLA has only axis-aligned bboxes (no strokes/contours/orientation; document drawings never scraped); bbox aspect has no sign-identity power (AUC 0.57-0.60, LOSO ~ majority). 3D: MUSINT II 43 models not downloadable/no licence, CMS Arachne 2D-only. Pipelines delivered and tested; no font substituted for evidence.
nodes.relevance_to: E205 (hard data ceiling: any stroke/contour leg of E205 is blocked without new acquisition; the ingestion pipelines are ready if data arrives)

nodes.what_was_done: Salgarella 2020 (Aegean Linear Script(s), CUP) WAS ACQUIRED (per-chapter PDFs with text layers) and the homomorphy grades extracted programmatically from Tables 2-3 (pp. 35-36) cell-fill colours, cross-checked against rendered pages.
nodes.outcome: 57 signs graded: 32 'homomorphic', 25 'homomorphic and also likely homophone'. NOTE: this supersedes the stale memory/ANCHORS.md note that Salgarella homomorphy is 'still pending' — the grades exist and are unused downstream. Caution: shape-based grades are circular for value transfer (the paper's image leg was capped <=0.75 as a circular demonstration).
nodes.relevance_to: E205 (a ready, primary-sourced palaeographic feature set; usable for measurement-channel validation but NOT as an independent value anchor)

nodes.what_was_done: Gate-verified bootstrap reconstruction of the published segmentation positive (DP-unigram micro-F1 0.4361 vs random 0.3888, 4-decimal exact; site-clustered bootstrap CI [0.0204,0.0991] reproduced, P(gap>0)=0.9985), then preregistered model classes (PYP/DP, Morfessor-MDL, neural) run under the frozen metric.
nodes.channel: unsupervised word segmentation on LA sign sequences
nodes.outcome: Published 0.436 stands; micro-F1 has a 0.577 all-boundaries ceiling (check cut-rate before reading gains as structure); supervised headroom estimated 0.62-0.66.
nodes.relevance_to: E207 (baseline + frozen metric + the cut-rate trap), E208 (any joint segmentation leg starts from this)

nodes.what_was_done: B-series: known-script boundary-recovery validation (B3), synthetic controls, then the B3-validated unsupervised families applied to LA producing a per-gap probabilistic boundary ensemble with 6 attributes (boundary prob, cross-model agreement, source representation, site stability, encoding sensitivity, damage sensitivity).
nodes.outcome: LA segmentation is an over-cut SUPERSET with ~0 skill over cut-everywhere at LA's hapax regime (B4); the ensemble artifact exists as a reusable probabilistic input rather than a claimed segmentation.
nodes.relevance_to: E207/E208 (the la_ensemble.json artifact is a ready-made soft-segmentation input; any 'joint segmentation' gain must beat the cut-everywhere degenerate solution)

nodes.what_was_done: Three independent anonymous morphology-induction families on LA (GORILA_WORD primary) with LB positive control, deflated against frequency-matched nulls; the A- prefixation finding characterized and later independently replicated as frontier epoch E103.
nodes.outcome: A- prefixation = the single graduated morphological finding: REPLICATED_RELATIVE_CONSTRAINT, L2/L3, no phonetic value; ledger KU-RO-terminal and libation order are the other K1-adaptive-validated L2/L3 positives. LB morphology positive control FIRES (0.562 vs ~0.30 floor) so LA's null is short-word, not detector failure.
nodes.relevance_to: E207 (the constraints any MDL/adaptor-grammar/subregular model must recover to be credible, and the deflation discipline it must match)

nodes.what_was_done: 15-WP campaign: A baseline+exclusions, B sign universe (166/163/158 inventories; 69 A-only signs image-rich but relationally dark), C anchor lattice (562 nodes/208 hyperedges; dependency-collapsed independent anchors = 0 — everything descends from one META_CONTINUITY_LA_eq_LB lineage), D source expansion, E stroke corpus, F substitution bridge, G anchor-threshold identifiability lab, H joint inference, I all-unresolved-sign search (0/151 retained; random-hyperedge null retains 0 in 200/200), J conditional language gate, K active acquisition ranking, L 3D readiness, M held-out/seals, N adaptive null (13,000 component nulls + 120 full-adaptive replicates), O synthesis.
nodes.outcome: ANCHOR_LATTICE_UNDERDETERMINED, established 4 independent ways. THE PRICING: absolute-value recovery (abs>=0.90, FP<=0.05) requires 12 anchors x 8 slots x 12 DISTINCT lineages; foothold abs>=0.75 = exactly 3 independent 8-slot anchors; abs>=0.50 at 2x8-slot. LA operating point: abs 0.000, residual ambiguity ~10^63.4 (G, operational) to >=10^270 equivalence classes (H, gauge-quotient lower bound). Clones add exactly zero; wrong anchors net-poisonous (f_wrong 0.1 -> FP 0.31); the 3 one-toponym-deep pins price at abs 0.012 / FP 0.23 = worse than silence. Discipline proven load-bearing: naive pipeline fabricates a decipherment 120/120 under null (and fires on real data); gated pipeline 0/120 with planted-positive 20/20.
nodes.relevance_to: E203 (the quantitative target to reproduce/extend with an exact engine; the G-surface and N-null protocols are the acceptance bar), E206 (anchor independence is THE bottleneck), E210 (depends on E203)

nodes.what_was_done: WP-H ran THREE genuinely-different custom solvers over a 67-cell CV domain (13 consonants x 5 vowels + 2 series cells): H_MODEL_1 Bayesian factor graph with Gibbs sampling; H_MODEL_2 CP/exact arc-consistency + model counting via sequential importance sampling + backbone extraction + gauge quotient; H_MODEL_3 MDL-penalized beam search with naive/dedup/Art.-XII-discounted evidence accounting. All hand-rolled numpy — NO industrial solver (no OR-Tools/Z3/pysat anywhere in the repo).
nodes.channel: joint inference over the anchor lattice
nodes.outcome: JOINT_INFERENCE_NULL, 3/3 solvers agree (Jaccard 0.905-1.0); A-only signs get 0.000 absolute bits in every solver x scenario x inventory, strictly BELOW the random-anchor null (p=0.000). The candidate UNSAT discovery (continuity pins x LA substitution constraints jointly unsatisfiable, 15/24 violations) was self-downgraded by WP-N to UNSAT_GENERIC: every matched random 38-pin set is also UNSAT (P=1.000), observed violations FEWER than null mean. MDL preference for the anchored system flips sign under honest dependency dedup (9 citations of one 7.7%-reliable channel = 5.92 false bits).
nodes.relevance_to: E203 (E203's 'exact identifiability engine (CP-SAT/SMT/counting)' would be the first industrial-solver formalization — it must reproduce the gauge quotient, the SIS count, and the UNSAT_GENERIC matched-null adjudication or it will rediscover generic UNSAT as fake signal), E210, E207 (MDL dedup lesson)

nodes.what_was_done: H3: morphology-first JOINT decipherment via three inference paradigms — Bayesian-joint, MDL commit (derivation-backbone-fitted), and constraint-satisfaction/integer-program — reusing the audited Foundry null machinery, single documented addition (prefix-aware matcher applied identically to real corpus and nulls).
nodes.outcome: AT_JOINT_INFERENCE_NULL — all paradigms at the end-to-end null; mechanical reason: LA internal structure is value-blind (relabeling-invariant, 0 exploitable bits, >=10^27 twins).
nodes.relevance_to: E203 (CSP/IP precedent + the relabeling-invariance obstruction any exact engine must quantify), E207

nodes.what_was_done: THE SIX FAMILIES, exactly: Round 1 = West Semitic + Pre-Greek/Anatolian; Round 2 = Hurrian + Luwian; Round 3 = Etruscan + Aegean-isolate substrate (Pre-Greek reconstructed only from Greek loanwords); each round also ran a same-structure random control. METHOD: each family = a bounded, preregistered phoneme->value correspondence + a small cited 6-entry lexicon (never fitted to LA), scored on 973 held-out multi-sign GORILA word tokens against the multi-family end-to-end null battery — order-shuffle S + wrong-language opaque LB W + random-prior R — Holm-adjusted, with leave-one-lexeme-out and a 300-draw random-lexicon false-clear calibration.
nodes.outcome: Every round AT_END_TO_END_NULL. Round 1: WS decisive 0.030 but the random control ALSO clears (same-structure artifact); only KU-RO='total' survives. Round 2: Hurrian 1.0, Luwian 0.284 (single TA-TI hit fails the random-prior null). Round 3: random control's bare match rate 0.054 EXCEEDS Etruscan's 0.033; isolate model predicts zero held-out forms. Mechanism isolated: nonzero LA match rates are generic word-shape typicality, not language-specific fit. Wrong-language opaque LB scores HIGHER than every LA hypothesis.
nodes.relevance_to: E208 (the tournament E208 proposes was already run 3 ways at fixed segmentation; E208's only new degrees of freedom are JOINT segmentation + phonetic priors — it must show why those clear a null battery this design should reuse verbatim)

nodes.what_was_done: R1 re-ran languages (SEM/ANA/TYR + Finnish negative control + CTRL) with relative-class admission; R2 added the 6 WP-G SEED_B toponym anchors; R3 varied inference paradigm. Anchor-lattice WP-J then built an authorization gate for any further language tournament.
nodes.outcome: R1 AT_END_TO_END_NULL, R2 AT_ANCHOR_CONSTRAINED_NULL, R3 AT_JOINT_INFERENCE_NULL — design space exhausted along language/anchor/paradigm axes. WP-J: J_NOT_AUTHORIZED (0/3 gate criteria) — the lattice constrains A-only signs by 0 bits, and a tournament scored on the unearned continuity licence would test Linear B, not Linear A. The 6-family null 'stands uncontested'.
nodes.relevance_to: E208/E209 (an authorization-gate precedent: E208 must pass a J-style licence-clean scoring check before running, and E209's sound-correspondence inference sits above both)

nodes.what_was_done: E006 tested four seed-efficient cross-script estimators where anchors only fix a global transform/coupling: EST_GW landmark-fused entropic Gromov-Wasserstein (alpha=0.5, eps=0.01), EST_SPEC orthogonal Procrustes on Laplacian eigenmaps, EST_OT anchor-regularized Sinkhorn on the unsupervised M2-signature cost, EST_CCA ridge map. Known-script calibration only, replicate-paired with E003, frozen hyperparameters.
nodes.outcome: SEED_EFFICIENCY_NOT_ACHIEVED — all four estimators fail to reach the required Holm-surviving hit rate at the LA operating point (b=5 seeds) even on a KNOWN script; the 3x shortfall is estimator-independent, i.e. an information problem, not geometry.
nodes.relevance_to: E210 (balanced entropic OT/GW is tried-and-null at LA anchor budgets; E210's partial/UNBALANCED variant is the genuinely untried delta, and it must first pass exactly this known-script bar)

nodes.what_was_done: E016: amortized simulation-based inference — a neural pair-posterior trained purely on a generative admin-syllabary simulator (prior matched to LA/LB aggregate stats; no sign identities), evaluated on an opaque known script degraded to LA token scale (LA_TOKEN_SCALE=5792) at anchor budgets 0/3/5, against the E006-best entropic Gromov-Wasserstein coupling; gauge-invariant value-CLASS scoring (ARI). LA never loaded.
nodes.outcome: SBI_MATCHES (bounded negative): SBI matches but does not beat the anchor-geometry solvers at the floor — new architecture, same information wall. An LA application would need its own prereg.
nodes.relevance_to: E210 + E203 (the simulator and the gauge-invariant ARI scoring are reusable; also a warning that model capacity does not substitute for anchors)

nodes.what_was_done: WP-F substitution-axis cross-script bridge with method M3 = fully-unsupervised entropic Gromov-Wasserstein between intra-script distance matrices (plus supervised variants), calibrated first on the KNOWN LB<->Cypriot pair. The LB consonant-axis calibration itself is solid (strengthens to 0.75 under frequency-disjoint holdout).
nodes.outcome: NO_POWER — the bridge fails even on the known LB<->Cypriot pair (zero Holm survivors), so LA<->LB is underdetermined a fortiori; relative compatibility only, no absolute value.
nodes.relevance_to: E210 (the known-pair calibration gate E210 inherits: if partial/unbalanced OT cannot align LB<->Cypriot substitution graphs, it never touches LA)

nodes.pointer: anchor-lattice scripts/h_joint_inference.py (H_MODEL_3); relative-phonology scripts/h3_candidate_round3.py (mdl_commit); main experiments/segmentation_extension/models_morfessor.py; frontier EPOCH_LEDGER.yaml (E09x deviations)
nodes.what_was_done: MDL used three ways: MDL-penalized beam over lattice-consistent value systems (with dependency-discounted accounting); MDL commit over a derivation backbone in the H3 paradigm sweep; Morfessor (MDL) as a segmentation baseline. Frontier epochs explicitly deferred heavier Bayesian/MDL segmenters when nulls were already decisive.
nodes.outcome: All null on LA: the decisive anchor-lattice lesson is that MDL preference FLIPS SIGN under honest dependency dedup — naive MDL rewards clone-stacking (5.92 false bits from 9 citations of one weak channel). Morfessor scores 0.156 on the frozen segmentation metric (far below DP-unigram 0.436). NO adaptor-grammar implementation exists anywhere in any worktree (grep: zero hits; nearest kin = PYP/DP segmenters in models_pyp.py).
nodes.relevance_to: E207 (its MDL leg has direct prior art + the dedup trap; its adaptor-grammar and subregular legs are genuinely first-time methods per the OPEN_AND_UNTESTED inventory)

nodes.what_was_done: The logos2 DAG defines the target epochs this scout maps onto: E203 exact identifiability engine (CP-SAT/SMT/counting, L0-L2), E205 palaeographic measurement channel A-D (L1-L2), E206 gated onomastic record linkage (<=L3, L4 only with 2nd channel; depends on E200/E201/SLOT_FREEZE), E207 MDL/adaptor-grammar/subregular morphology (<=L2), E208 joint segmentation + phonetic-prior language tournament (<=L5), E210 partial/unbalanced OT-graph alignment (<=L2 aux; depends on E201+E203).
nodes.outcome: Dependencies confirmed; every one of the six epochs has substantial prior art catalogued in the rows above, most of it closed-negative with named reopening conditions.
nodes.relevance_to: E203/E205/E206/E207/E208/E210 (the mapping key)

narrative: Scouted all 18 worktrees of the logos repo (git worktree list) for the six requested themes. Headline per theme: (a) TOPONYM/ONOMASTIC — the LA-LB administrative toponym channel is CLOSED with a split verdict (H_exact=NULL_PUBLISHED: fully powered, observed 0 exact continuities; H_drift=NO_POWER: drift needs the forbidden free mapping), with the five known pairs (pa-i-to, tu-ru-sa, di-ki-ta, i-da, se-to-i-ja) demoted to development benchmarks and the ritual fork also closed NO_POWER; the cross-script gate's two externally-timestamped one-shots delivered pins I+RI (Phase 1) and SU+TO (Phase 2), every recovery exactly one place-name identification deep, with the distributional channel at 0.0000 four times over; Anetaki (phase 3) currently supplies 0 new anchor legs (PENDING-FULL-EDITION); Egyptian external anchors reduce to {Phaistos} only (SOURCE_EXPANSION_NULL). E206's non-negotiable design constraints are therefore drift-tolerant pre-registered edit operations + dependency-distinct lineages + a new input freeze. (b) PALAEOGRAPHY/SIGLA — scripts/sigla_decode.py gives 802 docs/376 signs of bbox geometry; frontier epochs E076-E090 already mined that geometry at L2 (cross-site: shared glyph-size convention, frequency-size economy law, deliberate vertical ruling; HT-local: justification/heading/header registers under a doc-wide bounded writing width; horizontal 'ruling' refuted as width-driven); strokes/contours/3D are SOURCE_BLOCKED. Important correction to stale memory: Salgarella 2020 IS acquired (corpus/bronze/salgarella_2020/) and 57 homomorphy grades are extracted in experiments/crossscript_gate/salgarella_2020_grades.json (32 homomorphic, 25 also likely homophone) — available to E205, though shape-circular for value claims. (c) MORPHOLOGY/SEGMENTATION — the published 0.436 segmentation positive is gate-verified with a 0.577 all-boundaries ceiling; the relative-phonology B-series shows LA segmentation has ~0 skill over cut-everywhere at the hapax regime but left a reusable probabilistic boundary ensemble; the only graduated morphology finding is A- prefixation (E103, L2/L3, replicated, no value). (d) CSP/SAT — the anchor-lattice campaign (WPs A-O) closed ANCHOR_LATTICE_UNDERDETERMINED four independent ways; the pricing result: 12 anchors x 8 slots x 12 distinct lineages for recovery, foothold at 2-3 independent 8-slot anchors, LA at abs 0.000 with residual ambiguity ~10^63.4 (operational G-surface) to >=10^270 equivalence classes (H gauge quotient); solver formalism was three CUSTOM numpy solvers (Bayesian factor graph/Gibbs, CP arc-consistency + SIS model counting + backbone + gauge quotient, MDL beam) — no industrial CP-SAT/SMT anywhere, so E203's engine is genuinely new formalism but must reproduce the gauge quotient and the UNSAT_GENERIC adjudication (the campaign's own UNSAT find was refuted as generic: all matched random pin-sets also UNSAT). (e) LANGUAGE FAMILIES — the exact six: West Semitic, Pre-Greek/Anatolian (R1), Hurrian, Luwian (R2), Etruscan, Aegean-isolate substrate (R3), each a bounded preregistered phoneme->value map + 6-entry cited lexicon scored on 973 held-out GORILA tokens against the S/W/R null battery with Holm + LOO-lexeme + random-lexicon calibration — all AT_END_TO_END_NULL, with random lexicons matching as well as real languages (word-shape typicality), and the follow-up rounds (anchors added, paradigms varied) equally null; anchor-lattice WP-J then formally de-authorized further tournaments (J_NOT_AUTHORIZED). (f) OT/BAYESIAN/MDL — balanced entropic OT is well-trodden and null: Sinkhorn + entropic GW estimators (E006 SEED_EFFICIENCY_NOT_ACHIEVED on known script), GW substitution-bridge (WP-F NO_POWER even on the known LB<->Cypriot pair), amortized neural SBI (E016 matches-but-doesn't-beat); MDL appears as lattice beam / H3 commit / Morfessor, with the key trap that naive MDL rewards citation-clone stacking; NO adaptor-grammar, subregular-morphology, or partial/unbalanced-OT code exists anywhere — those E207/E210 legs are genuinely first-time. All paths above are absolute; all worktree branches and their gitignored (git add -f) experiment trees were readable.
gaps: No adaptor-grammar or subregular-morphology implementation exists in any worktree (grep across all experiments/ + scripts/: zero hits) — E207's two novel legs have no in-repo prior art; nearest kin are the PYP/DP segmenters (main experiments/segmentation_extension/models_pyp.py) and Morfessor-MDL. The methodology inventory's OPEN_AND_UNTESTED_METHODS.md does not list them either — check its lineage map before claiming novelty in prose.

No partial/unbalanced optimal transport anywhere — every prior OT use is BALANCED entropic (Sinkhorn/GW: E006, E016, anchor-lattice F2-M3), and all of it is null/no-power on KNOWN-script calibration at LA anchor budgets. E210 therefore has a real methodological delta but inherits a hard prior: it should be gated on first passing the LB<->Cypriot known-pair bar that killed F2.

No industrial CP-SAT/SMT/model-counting solver was ever used (no OR-Tools/Z3/pysat imports found) — E203 is new formalism, but the acceptance bar is already set: reproduce the gauge quotient (~10^63.4 operational / >=10^270 classes), the 12x8x12 threshold surface, and the WP-N matched-null adjudication that downgraded the campaign's own UNSAT to UNSAT_GENERIC.

Drift-tolerant onomastic matching was never designed: la-lb-continuity's H_drift=NO_POWER exists precisely because no pre-registered null-calibrated edit-operation model exists. FINAL_CHANNEL_VERDICT item 14 explicitly requires a new input-freeze review for it — this is E206's opening move, not an optional refinement.

Palaeographic data ceiling: stroke/contour/orientation and 3D channels are SOURCE_BLOCKED (SigLA bbox-only; MUSINT II inaccessible; Anetaki 2D photos only) — E205 channels A-D are confined to bbox geometry already heavily mined by E076-E090 unless new data is acquired. Conversely, the acquired Salgarella 2020 grades (57 signs) are an UNUSED primary source (memory notes claiming it 'pending' are stale).

Ariadne-2025 Anetaki preliminary material is published but NOT ingested into silver; phase3 GAP_DELTA = PENDING-FULL-EDITION; multiple frozen prospective seals exist (foundry SEAL_5, M_ANETAKI_LATTICE_DELTA_SEAL, frontier FRACTION_ORDER) that E213-type work must score, not re-derive.

Anchor supply is census-exhausted: crossscript Phase-2 census + anchor-lattice WP-D/WP-K agree no accessible acquisition currently supplies even one dependency-distinct multi-slot anchor (best route: Egyptian-attested toponym on a new >=4-slot LA text, worth ~9 of 63.4 log10 units). E206 cannot manufacture independence from the existing single continuity meta-lineage.

Not exhaustively scouted (out of scope): foundry WP1-WP5 detailed reports, the frontier campaign's ~90 non-spatial epochs, E204's fraction/metrology lineage, the admin-schema/observable-channels branches, and logos-linear-a_frontier_72h (a stray duplicate directory name alongside the real frontier worktree — worth confirming it is not a divergent copy).

E205/E206/E207/E208/E203/E210 definitions were read from the UNTRACKED logos2 scaffold (/home/claude-runner/gitlab/n8n/logos-logos2/research/logos2/EXPERIMENT_DAG.json) — uncommitted, so the mapping is to the DAG as of today; if the DAG changes, re-map.
